signals.headline: HEADLINE: Bitcoin Stalls Below $73K for Third Time; $75K Now Critical Bull Market Threshold | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
HEADLINE: Bitcoin Stalls Below $73K for Third Time; $75K Now Critical Bull Market Threshold | YES | MED confidence**

Bitcoin has failed to break past $73,000 for the third consecutive time[2]. Analysts cite $75,000 as the key resistance level needed to trigger a sustained crypto bull market, signaling continued consolidation rather than breakout conditions[2].

signals.headline: HEADLINE: Geopolitical Tensions (Iran) Continue Driving Crypto Volatility and Oil Price Movements | YES | MED confidence
signals.raw:
HEADLINE: Geopolitical Tensions (Iran) Continue Driving Crypto Volatility and Oil Price Movements | YES | MED confidence**

Middle East tensions remain an active macro driver affecting cryptocurrency markets, with Bitcoin currently holding above $71,000 amid geopolitical uncertainty[3].

signals.headline: HEADLINE: Alameda Unstakes $16M in Solana, Signaling FTX Creditor Distributions | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
HEADLINE: Alameda Unstakes $16M in Solana, Signaling FTX Creditor Distributions | YES | HIGH confidence**

Alameda has unstaked $16 million in SOL tokens, according to Arkham analytics[2]. This indicates potential upcoming creditor distributions related to the FTX collapse resolution, which could affect SOL supply dynamics and market sentiment.

signals.headline: HEADLINE: Solana Holds $84 Range Amid Market Volatility; Key Support at $76-$80 Under Pressure | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
HEADLINE: Solana Holds $84 Range Amid Market Volatility; Key Support at $76-$80 Under Pressure | YES | MED confidence**

Solana is trading around $82-$84 with on-chain data showing whale accumulation (1.2 million SOL added in 6 hours)[1], but the $76 support level remains critical—a break below could trigger a slide to $67[6].
